description_long: This guard rail consists of a series of horizontal bars supported by two robust vertical posts at each end. The structure is made of a dark, likely metal material, giving it a strong and industrial appearance suitable for urban environments. The horizontal rails are evenly spaced, providing a barrier that prevents passage while allowing visibility through the gaps. The posts are squared and slightly wider than the rails, with flat tops that may serve as mounting points. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible decorative elements or reflective markings. The ends of the rail are blunt, and the construction suggests it is intended for installation along roadsides, sidewalks, or parking areas to enhance safety.
description: A sturdy, dark-colored metal guard rail with horizontal bars and two square end posts, designed for urban safety barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail with all horizontal bars and both end posts visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the thickness of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the horizontal bars and end posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the guard rail.
